ownerTitle: Interdisciplinary Arts and Sciences: Individually-designed (BA) - Option One
primarySourceLabel: UW General Catalog Interdisciplinary Arts and Sciences individually designed major
sourceLabel: UW General Catalog Interdisciplinary Arts and Sciences individually designed major

sourceSectionFilterAuditRows.sectionTitle: For Global Studies, you need to complete a minimum of 50 credits, depending on foreign language competency. Overall, 30 credits of upper-division credits in the concentration and 45 credits of IAS courses are required to meet the degree requirements. Additionally, at least 5 credits must be from two interdisciplinary areas: Arts and Humanities (A&H) and Social Sciences (SSc). You must earn a total of 180 quarter credits, or 225 quarter credits for a double degree, to earn a bachelor of arts degree in your chosen major.

Additionally, at least 5 credits must be from two interdisciplinary areas: Arts and Humanities (A&H) and Social Sciences (SSc). You must earn a total of 180 quarter credits, or 225 quarter credits for a double degree, to earn a bachelor of arts degree in your chosen major.

sourceSectionFilterAuditLines: [parser prerequisite filter audit] Owner id: uw-tacoma-interdisciplinary-arts-and-sciences-individually-designed:pathway:option-one Source URL: https://www.washington.edu/students/gencat/program/T/SocialSciences-1132.html Section title: For Global Studies, you need to complete a minimum of 50 credits, depending on foreign language competency. Overall, 30 credits of upper-division credits in the concentration and 45 credits of IAS courses are required to meet the degree requirements. Additionally, at least 5 credits must be from two interdisciplinary areas: Arts and Humanities (A&H) and Social Sciences (SSc). You must earn a total of 180 quarter credits, or 225 quarter credits for a double degree, to earn a bachelor of arts degree in your chosen major. supportLists.listTitle: See the Law and Policy web page for a list of approved courses.

requirementCueLines: For Global Studies, you need to complete a minimum of 50 credits, depending on foreign language competency. Overall, 30 credits of upper-division credits in the concentration and 45 credits of IAS courses are required to meet the degree requirements. Additionally, at least 5 credits must be from two interdisciplinary areas: Arts and Humanities (A&H) and Social Sciences (SSc). You must earn a total of 180 quarter credits, or 225 quarter credits for a double degree, to earn a bachelor of arts degree in your chosen major.
International or Global Interactions Required Core: 5 credits
International Focus: 40 Credits, 30 credits to be upper division at 300-400 level
Law in a Global Context: 5 credits
Capstone: select one of the options below (5 credits)
earning a minimum of 3.0 in TWRT 211; and
taking an additional 5 credits of capstone by taking TPOL S 480
chooseStatements: Capstone: select one of the options below (5 credits)

parsedDegreeMapBlockCandidates.title: Interdisciplinary Arts and Sciences: Individually-designed (BA) - Option One parsed official source requirements
sourceLineHints: For Global Studies, you need to complete a minimum of 50 credits, depending on foreign language competency. Overall, 30 credits of upper-division credits in the concentration and 45 credits of IAS courses are required to meet the degree requirements. Additionally, at least 5 credits must be from two interdisciplinary areas: Arts and Humanities (A&H) and Social Sciences (SSc). You must earn a total of 180 quarter credits, or 225 quarter credits for a double degree, to earn a bachelor of arts degree in your chosen major.
International or Global Interactions Required Core: 5 credits
International Focus: 40 Credits, 30 credits to be upper division at 300-400 level
